solutionFiles.content:
project_title = input()
description = input()
main_file = input()
input_file = input()

print(f"Project: {project_title}")
print(f"Description: {description}")
print(f"Main file: {main_file}")
print(f"Input file: {input_file}")
print(f"How to run: Open {main_file}, click Run, and check the output panel.")
